product_overview: This product enhancement introduces robust client-side filtering capabilities for the campaign list, allowing users to filter campaigns by brand and quarter seamlessly using Mantine UI components within a Next.js and Firebase environment.
core_goals: Enable users to filter campaign posts effectively by brand and quarter.
Ensure filtering logic accurately displays posts that meet all selected criteria.
Provide a reset functionality to clear filters and display the full campaign list.
Deliver a user-friendly and responsive UI using the Mantine component library.
key_features: Client-side filtering of campaigns by brand using Mantine Select components.
Filtering campaigns by quarter to narrow results further.
Support for multi-criteria filtering where both brand and quarter filters apply simultaneously.
A 'Reset Filters' button to clear all selected filters and restore the full list of campaigns.
user_flow_summary: User selects a single brand filter (e.g., 'ASUS MB') and the campaign list updates to show only posts related to the selected brand.
User adds a quarter filter (e.g., 'Q1') in addition to the brand filter and the list updates to show campaigns matching both conditions.
User clicks the 'Reset Filters' button which clears all filters and reloads the full campaign list, showing all posts.
validation_criteria: When only 'ASUS MB' is selected, verify only posts related to ASUS MB are displayed.
When 'Q1' is added to the 'ASUS MB' filter, verify that only posts matching both brand and quarter criteria remain.
Upon clicking 'Reset Filters', verify the campaign list resets and displays all posts without any filters applied.

features.name: Campaign List Filtering
features.description: Filters campaigns by brand and quarter using client-side logic and Mantine Select components.
